description: React context pattern: WavesmithMetaStoreContext provides metaStore + persistence via createContext/useContext. AuthContext should follow same pattern.
relevantCode: const MetaStoreContext = createContext<MetaStoreContextValue | null>(null); export function useWavesmithMetaStore() { ... }
recommendation: Create AuthContext.tsx with AuthProvider component and useAuth hook. Provider initializes auth service and AuthStore, subscribes to auth state changes.
